title: thelypteris brassii
intro: Thelypteris brassii, also known as the New Caledonian Maiden's Hair, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris brassii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in New Caledonia.
